stemHtml: In the ICAO standard atmosphere, which of the following alternatives indicates the correct vertical temperature distribution in the lowest 11 km?

options.a: 13°C at mean sea level, decreasing at 2°C per 1 000 feet.
options.b: 15.2°C at mean sea level, decreasing at 0.65°C per 100 metres.
options.c: 15°C at mean sea level, decreasing at 0.65°C per 100 metres.
options.d: 15°C at mean sea level, decreasing at 0.65°C per 100 feet.
